description: Composite factor combining both pure inflation sensitivity and interest rate sensitivity into a holistic metric of a stock's macro inflation exposure; preferred for portfolio risk modeling and thematic tilts

Stock-level sensitivity to expected inflation changes, "neutralized" or adjusted to remove the contemporaneous effect of benchmark interest rate changes; captures pure inflation beta orthogonal to interest rates
Stock-level estimated “beta” sensitivity to expected inflation, specifically to changes in the 10-year breakeven inflation rate, derived from elastic net regression
